description: Polish and wire QuantCalendar - integrate @quant/brand, wire real API via React Query, add Framer Motion spring animations, loading/empty/error/success states, responsive 360-1440px, dark mode, performance, accessibility.
steps: 1. Add @quant/brand to package.json dependencies and add path mappings to tsconfig.json (copy pattern from quantads tsconfig.json which already has @quant/brand paths)
2. Update src/app/globals.css to import brand tokens: use @quant/brand colors for CSS vars, ensure dark mode vars match brand dark theme
3. Update src/app/layout.tsx: import brand typography/app config from @quant/brand, use quantcalendar app icon from brand icons, set up proper metadata with brand colors for theme-color
4. Update src/providers/app-providers.tsx: integrate brand theme context, ensure dark mode toggle works with brand themes

5. Update src/hooks/useEvents.ts and src/hooks/useCalendars.ts: wire to real backend API routes (already proxying to QUANTCALENDAR_BACKEND_URL). Add React Query mutations for create/update/delete events. Add useMutation hooks for event CRUD. Ensure proper error handling, optimistic updates

6. Update src/components/CalendarGrid.tsx, MonthView.tsx, WeekView.tsx, DayView.tsx, AgendaView.tsx: add Framer Motion spring animations from @quant/brand motion.spring configs for view transitions. Use AnimatePresence for view switching. Add 44px min tap targets on mobile. Add hover/press/focus states on all interactive elements
7. Update src/components/EventCard.tsx: add spring microinteractions (scale on hover/press), blurhash placeholder for event thumbnails if applicable, proper focus ring
8. Update src/components/EventForm.tsx: add form validation feedback with success/error states, spring animations on dialog open/close, proper aria attributes
9. Update src/components/CalendarSidebar.tsx and MiniCalendar.tsx: responsive collapse on mobile, spring animations, brand icon in header

10. Update src/app/page.tsx: ensure LoadingState/ErrorState/EmptyState from @quant/shared-ui are used with brand theming. Add empty state illustration when no events. Add success toast on event creation
11. Update src/app/error.tsx and src/app/loading.tsx to use brand colors and animations
12. Ensure all components are responsive 360-1440px with proper breakpoints. Use CSS container queries or media queries. 44px minimum tap targets on interactive elements
13. Run pnpm --filter @quant/quantcalendar typecheck && pnpm --filter @quant/quantcalendar lint to verify
acceptance_criteria: pnpm --filter @quant/quantcalendar typecheck passes with zero errors
pnpm --filter @quant/quantcalendar lint passes with zero errors
@quant/brand is imported and used (motion springs, app config, theme colors) - no mock data
All hooks use React Query with proper loading/error/success states
Framer Motion spring animations on view transitions, event interactions, dialogs
Dark mode fully functional with brand dark theme colors
All interactive elements have 44px minimum tap targets
Proper aria-labels, roles, keyboard navigation on all interactive elements
findings: Pre-existing typecheck failures: (1) packages/server-core references @quant/database which has no dist output, causing backend tsconfig check to fail on both base and feature branch. (2) CSS side-effect import in layout.tsx triggers TS2882 without .next/types generated. Both issues exist on base commit and are not caused by this feature. Frontend tsc --noEmit passes with only the pre-existing CSS error. Lint passes clean.
